site.name: ToolBoxy
site.description: 100+ free online tools for PDF, image, video, text, and developer tasks. No installation required.

home.hero_description: 100+ free utilities for PDF, image, video, text and more. No sign-up required. Works in your browser.
home.save_cta_sub: Free account, no credit card required.

upload.drop_here: Drop files here or click to upload

limits.upgrade_prompt: Upgrade to Pro for unlimited access
limits.daily_limit_reached: Daily limit reached. Upgrade to Pro or try again tomorrow.

errors.file_too_large: File is too large. Max size is {size}MB.

toolDescriptions.pdf-to-text: Extract plain text from PDF files instantly in your browser. No upload to server needed.
toolDescriptions.base64-decoder: Decode Base64 encoded strings back to plain text. Supports Unicode / UTF-8.

gate.title: Get more from ToolBoxy
gate.desc: Create a free account to save your history, bookmark your favorite tools, and get a personal dashboard — no credit card needed.
gate.signin: Already have an account? Sign in

romaji-kana-converter.intro: Type romaji (Latin letters) and instantly get hiragana or katakana, or paste kana to get romaji back. Everything runs in your browser.

faq.a: Yes — completely free with no account or installation required.

faq.q: Does it handle long words and small tsu?
faq.a: Yes. Double consonants become っ (sokuon) and youon like kya/sha are supported.

fullwidth-halfwidth-converter.intro: Paste text to convert between full-width (全角) and half-width (半角) ASCII letters, digits, symbols and spaces.

faq.a: Yes, free and runs entirely in your browser.
ASCII letters, numbers, punctuation and spaces. Kanji and kana are left unchanged.

hiragana-katakana-converter.intro: Convert hiragana to katakana or katakana to hiragana instantly. Useful for Japanese study and proofreading.

faq.a: Yes, free with no sign-up.
Kana mapping is one-to-one, so conversion is exact.

hangul-romaja-converter.intro: Convert Korean Hangul into Latin romanization using the Revised Romanization system. Great for names, places and study.

faq.a: Yes, free and browser-based.
It converts each syllable directly. Pronunciation changes between syllables are not applied, so some names may differ from official spellings.

wifi-qr-generator.intro: Enter your network name and password to get a QR code guests can scan to connect.

faq.a: Yes — completely free, no account or installation.
Yes. The QR is built in your browser and never sent to a server.

vcard-qr-generator.intro: Fill in your contact details to generate a QR code that saves a contact when scanned.

faq.a: Yes — completely free, no account or installation.

email-qr-generator.intro: Enter a recipient, subject and body to make a QR that opens a pre-filled email.

faq.a: Yes — completely free, no account or installation.

phone-qr-generator.intro: Choose call or SMS, enter a number, and get a scannable QR code.

faq.a: Yes — completely free, no account or installation.

body-fat-calculator.intro: Enter your measurements to estimate body fat percentage with the US Navy circumference method.

faq.a: Yes — completely free, no account or installation.
It is a good estimate but less precise than a body scan. Not medical advice.

due-date-calculator.intro: Enter the first day of your last period to estimate your due date and current week.

faq.a: Yes — completely free, no account or installation.
Naegele’s rule: last period plus 280 days, adjusted for cycle length.

target-heart-rate-calculator.intro: Enter your age (and optionally resting heart rate) to see training heart-rate zones.

faq.a: Yes — completely free, no account or installation.

ideal-weight-calculator.intro: Enter height and sex to see ideal body weight from several clinical formulas.

faq.a: Yes — completely free, no account or installation.

ovulation-calculator.intro: Enter your last period and cycle length to estimate ovulation and fertile days.

faq.a: Yes — completely free, no account or installation.

faq.q: Can I use it for contraception?
faq.a: No — this is a calendar estimate, not a contraceptive method.

robots-txt-generator.intro: Choose a crawl policy, add disallow paths and your sitemap to generate robots.txt.

faq.a: Yes — completely free, no account or installation.
Place it at the root of your domain, e.g. example.com/robots.txt.

sitemap-generator.intro: Paste your URLs to build a valid XML sitemap you can submit to Google Search Console.

faq.a: Yes — completely free, no account or installation.

utm-builder.intro: Add your URL and campaign details to build a trackable link with UTM parameters.

faq.a: Yes — completely free, no account or installation.

schema-markup-generator.intro: Pick a type and fill the fields to generate ready-to-paste JSON-LD structured data.

faq.a: Yes — completely free, no account or installation.

htaccess-redirect-generator.intro: Add redirect pairs (and optional HTTPS/www forcing) to generate .htaccess rules.

faq.a: Yes — completely free, no account or installation.

favicon-generator.intro: Upload a square image and download favicons in every size, plus the HTML tags to add them.

faq.a: Yes — completely free, no account needed.
No — everything is processed locally in your browser.

webp-converter.intro: Drop an image and convert it to WebP, PNG or JPG with adjustable quality.

faq.a: Yes — completely free, no account needed.
No — everything is processed locally in your browser.

faq.a: Yes — completely free, no account needed.
No — everything is processed locally in your browser.

compound-interest-calculator.intro: Enter your starting amount, rate, term and monthly contribution to project your savings.

faq.a: Yes — completely free, no account needed.

salary-converter.intro: Enter any pay rate and see the equivalent hourly, weekly, monthly and yearly amounts.

No — it shows gross pay before tax, which varies by country.

vat-calculator.intro: Enter an amount and rate, then add or remove VAT to see net, tax and gross.

faq.a: Yes — completely free, no account needed.

savings-goal-calculator.intro: Enter your goal, current savings, monthly deposit and return to see the time needed.

faq.a: Yes — completely free, no account needed.

random-string-generator.intro: Choose length and character sets to generate secure random strings or tokens.

faq.a: Yes — completely free, no account needed.
Yes — it uses the browser crypto API and nothing is sent to a server.

No — everything runs locally in your browser.

faq.a: Yes — completely free, no account needed.

faq.a: With the standard amortization formula using your rate and term.
